ToolboxElements.Description: Insert a row with primary key and one data column.
ToolboxElements.Name: Oracle Insert (1 Column)

ToolboxElements.Description: Insert a row with primary key and two data columns.
ToolboxElements.Name: Oracle Insert (2 Columns)

ToolboxElements.Description: Insert a row with primary key and three data columns.
ToolboxElements.Name: Oracle Insert (3 Columns)

ToolboxElements.Description: Insert using a sequence for the primary key and one data column.
ToolboxElements.Name: Oracle Insert with Sequence (1 Column)

ToolboxElements.Description: Insert using a sequence for the primary key and two data columns.
ToolboxElements.Name: Oracle Insert with Sequence (2 Columns)

ToolboxElements.Description: Insert using a sequence for the primary key and three data columns.
ToolboxElements.Name: Oracle Insert with Sequence (3 Columns)

ToolboxElements.Content:
MERGE INTO <Table> t
USING (SELECT <PrimaryKeyValue> AS <PrimaryKeyColumn>, <Value0> AS <Column0> FROM dual) s
ON (t.<PrimaryKeyColumn> = s.<PrimaryKeyColumn>)
WHEN MATCHED THEN
  UPDATE SET t.<Column0> = s.<Column0>
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
  INSERT (<PrimaryKeyColumn>, <Column0>)
  VALUES (s.<PrimaryKeyColumn>, s.<Column0>);
ToolboxElements.Description: Upsert using MERGE with one data column.
ToolboxElements.Name: Oracle Upsert MERGE (1 Column)

ToolboxElements.Content:
MERGE INTO <Table> t
USING (SELECT <PrimaryKeyValue> AS <PrimaryKeyColumn>, <Value0> AS <Column0>, <Value1> AS <Column1> FROM dual) s
ON (t.<PrimaryKeyColumn> = s.<PrimaryKeyColumn>)
WHEN MATCHED THEN
  UPDATE SET t.<Column0> = s.<Column0>, t.<Column1> = s.<Column1>
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
  INSERT (<PrimaryKeyColumn>, <Column0>, <Column1>)
  VALUES (s.<PrimaryKeyColumn>, s.<Column0>, s.<Column1>);
ToolboxElements.Description: Upsert using MERGE with two data columns.
ToolboxElements.Name: Oracle Upsert MERGE (2 Columns)

ToolboxElements.Content:
MERGE INTO <Table> t
USING (SELECT <PrimaryKeyValue> AS <PrimaryKeyColumn>, <Value0> AS <Column0>, <Value1> AS <Column1>, <Value2> AS <Column2> FROM dual) s
ON (t.<PrimaryKeyColumn> = s.<PrimaryKeyColumn>)
WHEN MATCHED THEN
  UPDATE SET t.<Column0> = s.<Column0>, t.<Column1> = s.<Column1>, t.<Column2> = s.<Column2>
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
  INSERT (<PrimaryKeyColumn>, <Column0>, <Column1>, <Column2>)
  VALUES (s.<PrimaryKeyColumn>, s.<Column0>, s.<Column1>, s.<Column2>);
ToolboxElements.Description: Upsert using MERGE with three data columns.
ToolboxElements.Name: Oracle Upsert MERGE (3 Columns)
